title: Korbond Double Sided Lint Remover Clothes Brush - Reusable Lint Brush for Clothes and Furniture - Effective Cleaning - 23.5 x 5.6 x 2.2 cm
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: SIMPLE CLEANING: Swipe the brush one way as indicated by the arrows to collect dust, lint, and fur. Then once satisfied with the result, swipe in the opposite direction onto a dusting cloth or hand to remove the particles from the brush and repeat.

EFFECTIVE CLEANING: This brush makes light work of lint, hair, dust, and dirt, effectively removing it from clothes, furniture, soft furnishings, curtains, car mats, pet beds and trousers. It is suitable for use on all fabrics including cashmere, wool, polyester, cotton, felt, denim, cotton.

VERSATILE: Korbond’s Double Sided Lint Brush offers a lint, dust, and cat or dog hair removal solution of every household and suitable for everyday use. The ergonomic handle makes extended use comfortable for left or right-handed users and features a hook for hanging the brush when not in use.
ESSENTIAL: No refills required, this infinitely reusable brush is ideal for use on laundry, car seats and upholstery. With no need for a difficult to use stand for the brush, it can be used anywhere.
With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools, and accessories
description: From the manufacturer Korbond Lint Brush Korbond Double Sided Lint Brush preserves clothing, upholstery and other fabrics by removing lint, dust and hair. The fibre material featured on both sides of the brush attracts dust particles to give clothes a fresh and clean look. ESSENTIAL No refills required, this infinitely reusable brush is ideal for use on laundry, car seats and upholstery. With no need for a difficult to use stand for the brush, it can be used anywhere. VERSATILE TOOL Korbond’s Double Sided Lint Brush offers a lint, dust, and cat or dog hair removal solution of every household and suitable for everyday use. The ergonomic handle makes extended use comfortable for left or right-handed users and features a hook for hanging the brush when not in use. SIMPLE TO USE Swipe the brush one way as indicated by the arrows to collect dust, lint, and fur. Then once satisfied with the result, swipe in the opposite direction onto a dusting cloth or hand to remove the particles from the brush and repeat.
